lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Greetings, I suppose you're one of those twolegs obsessed with fish?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe. I could just like swimming around.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Well, if you are, you've come to the right plaice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Plaice? Really?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Is there somefin wrong with that? I mean, it's not like I have anyfin better to do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please stop.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Reely? And there I trout you were here to sea what you could sea and experience the opportunaty of a lifetime swimming with the fishes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really. Really stop.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: What's wrong, do you need a herring aid?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nooooo....

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Oh don't be so crabby. You should be more up to date with current affairs. Shoaly you like puns chum?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: A blenny for your thoughts?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Make it stop.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Ahh, salty I sea. You provoked me into this and now you'll feel the wrasse of my tongue.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: *whimpers*

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to enter a private instance please.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Sorry, but you're really not experienced enough to use my cavern.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: I'll want 200 numulites first. If you pay me that, I'll let you in there as much as you like for the rest of this day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 200 numulites.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I pay for permanent access?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: I suppose so. Give me 20,000 numulites and I'll stop charging you for entry forever.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 20,000 numulites.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Thanks - no more entry fees for you!

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: You've already paid for access for the rest of today. You can come and go all day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I understand. Thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: My name is Ceto. I used to be a carefree soul, but now that the twolegs are interested in these little bits of bone, I just keep my little fish farm going and the twolegs pay me a few squid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Shouldn't you be with your people or something?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Well, they said I was too young to swim with them, and I should be responsible and get a job. They're so old school.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I catch fish here?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Ahh well, I've set up a pretty good fish trap here, the terrain really lends itself to it. But you'll need a couple of drift nets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How do I get those?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Well I weave mine from my sisters' hair, but you'll have to make do with some plant fibres I guess. I think the twolegs have ways to do that, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, usually we use jute on a loom.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Fintastic. You may also find something spikey helps to disturb the fish and make them panic.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Spikey?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Yes, something with lots of spikes, maybe like a trident.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bye

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Sea you later.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Sorry, but you're really not experienced enough to use my cavern.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: I'll want 200 numulites to let you enter. If you pay me that, I'll let you in there as much as you like for the rest of this day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, here's 200 numulites.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Those were some fintastic fossils, thank you. Don't flounder around out here, you can go in whenever you like today.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Those were some fintastic fossils. You needn't flounder around out here - after what you paid me, I won't charge you to enter the cave again.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: You don't have enough numulites to interest me. I'll want 200.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Sorry, but you're really not experienced enough to use my cavern.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: You don't have enough numulites to interest me. I'll want 200.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Oh the huge-manatee.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Who needs fronds when you have anenomes?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: I'm kraken me up.

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Why so sea-rious?

lines.speaker: Ceto
lines.text: Twolegs are so shellfish.
